title: Chisel Modernity
description: Updated old 1.12.2 chisel textures to look better with modern textures.
body:
This resource pack updates the textures of boards and mossy stones so that they are more compatible with the updated textures.
Some textures were taken from a newer version of Chisel, and some, for lack of analogues, were made from scratch.

Also, some planks textures were brought under one general style.

Will there be further updates to other blocks? Maybe.

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6f0bad67198fc1358324fe038488f4868754f7a.png)
